name: File3dmCurvePiping.CapTypes
summary: Defines how the pipe is capped at the ends.

enum_values.name: Flat
enum_values.summary: A flat surface will cap the pipe.

enum_values.name: Box
enum_values.summary: A simple construction will cap the pipe.

enum_values.name: Dome
enum_values.summary: A meridians-and-parallels hemisphere construction will cap the pipe.
